en: But Saul, still breathing threats and murder against the disciples of the Lord, went to the high priest
zh: 掃羅仍向主的門徒發恐嚇兇殺的話。他到大祭司那裡，

en: and asked him for letters to the synagogues at Damascus, so that if he found any belonging to the Way, men or women, he might bring them bound to Jerusalem.
zh: 要求他發公函給大馬士革各會堂，如果發現奉行這道的人，准他連男帶女緝拿到耶路撒冷。

en: Now as he went on his way, he approached Damascus, and suddenly a light from heaven flashed around him.
zh: 他快到大馬士革的時候，忽然有光從天上向他四面照射。

en: And falling to the ground he heard a voice saying to him, "Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting me?"
zh: 他仆倒在地，聽見有聲音對他說：“掃羅，掃羅！你為甚麼迫害我？”

en: And he said, "Who are you, Lord?" And he said, "I am Jesus, whom you are persecuting.
zh: 他說：“主啊，你是誰？”主說：“我就是你所迫害的耶穌。

en: But rise and enter the city, and you will be told what you are to do."
zh: 起來，進城去！你應當作的事，一定有人告訴你。”

en: The men who were traveling with him stood speechless, hearing the voice but seeing no one.
zh: 同行的人，聽見聲音，卻看不見人，只是目瞪口呆地站在那裡。

en: Saul rose from the ground, and although his eyes were opened, he saw nothing. So they led him by the hand and brought him into Damascus.
zh: 掃羅從地上爬起來，睜開眼睛，卻甚麼也看不見。他們牽著他的手，領他進大馬士革。

en: And for three days he was without sight, and neither ate nor drank.
zh: 他三天都不能看見甚麼，不吃也不喝。

en: Now there was a disciple at Damascus named Ananias. The Lord said to him in a vision, "Ananias." And he said, "Here I am, Lord."
zh: 在大馬士革，有一個門徒名叫亞拿尼亞，主在異象中對他說：“亞拿尼亞！”他說：“主啊，我在這裡。”

en: And the Lord said to him, "Rise and go to the street called Straight, and at the house of Judas look for a man of Tarsus named Saul, for behold, he is praying,
zh: 主說：“起來，到那叫直街的路上去，要在猶大家裡找一個大數人，名叫掃羅。你看，他正在禱告，

en: and he has seen in a vision a man named Ananias come in and lay his hands on him so that he might regain his sight."
zh: 在異象中他看見一個人，名叫亞拿尼亞，進來為他按手，使他可以再看得見。”

en: But Ananias answered, "Lord, I have heard from many about this man, how much evil he has done to your saints at Jerusalem.
zh: 但亞拿尼亞回答：“主啊，我聽見許多人說起這個人，他在耶路撒冷作了許多苦害你聖徒的事；

en: And here he has authority from the chief priests to bind all who call on your name."
zh: 並且他在這裡得到祭司長的授權，要捆綁所有求告你名的人。”

en: But the Lord said to him, "Go, for he is a chosen instrument of mine to carry my name before the Gentiles and kings and the children of Israel.
zh: 主對他說：“你去吧！這人是我揀選的器皿，為要把我的名傳給外族人、君王和以色列人。

en: For I will show him how much he must suffer for the sake of my name."
zh: 我要指示他，為了我的名他必須受許多的苦。”

en: So Ananias departed and entered the house. And laying his hands on him he said, "Brother Saul, the Lord Jesus who appeared to you on the road by which you came has sent me so that you may regain your sight and be filled with the Holy Spirit."
zh: 亞拿尼亞就去了，進了那家，為掃羅按手，說：“掃羅弟兄，在你來的路上向你顯現的耶穌，就是主，差我來使你可以看見，又被聖靈充滿。”

en: And immediately something like scales fell from his eyes, and he regained his sight. Then he rose and was baptized;
zh: 立刻有鱗狀的東西，從掃羅的眼裡掉下來，他就能看見了。於是起來，受了洗，

en: and taking food, he was strengthened. For some days he was with the disciples at Damascus.
zh: 吃過了飯，就有氣力了。 他和大馬士革的門徒一同住了幾天，

en: And immediately he proclaimed Jesus in the synagogues, saying, "He is the Son of God."
zh: 隨即在各會堂傳講耶穌，說他是 神的兒子。

en: And all who heard him were amazed and said, "Is not this the man who made havoc in Jerusalem of those who called upon this name? And has he not come here for this purpose, to bring them bound before the chief priests?"
zh: 聽見的人都很驚奇，說：“在耶路撒冷殘害求告這名的，不是這個人嗎？他來這裡不是要緝拿他們交給祭司長嗎？”

en: But Saul increased all the more in strength, and confounded the Jews who lived in Damascus by proving that Jesus was the Christ.
zh: 然而掃羅更加有能力，駁倒住在大馬士革的猶太人，證明耶穌是基督。

en: When many days had passed, the Jews plotted to kill him,
zh: 過了許多日子，猶太人商議要殺掉掃羅；

en: but their plot became known to Saul. They were watching the gates day and night in order to kill him,
zh: 但他們的計謀給掃羅知道了。他們就在各城門日夜把守，要殺掉他。

en: but his disciples took him by night and let him down through an opening in the wall, lowering him in a basket.
zh: 於是他的門徒就趁夜用大籃子把他從城牆上縋下去。

en: And when he had come to Jerusalem, he attempted to join the disciples. And they were all afraid of him, for they did not believe that he was a disciple.
zh: 掃羅到了耶路撒冷，想要接近門徒，但大家都怕他，不信他是個門徒。

en: But Barnabas took him and brought him to the apostles and declared to them how on the road he had seen the Lord, who spoke to him, and how at Damascus he had preached boldly in the name of Jesus.
zh: 只有巴拿巴接待他，帶他去見使徒，把他怎樣在路上看見主，主向他說話，和他怎樣在大馬士革奉耶穌的名放膽講道，都講了出來。

en: So he went in and out among them at Jerusalem, preaching boldly in the name of the Lord.
zh: 於是掃羅在耶路撒冷和門徒一同出入，奉主的名放膽講道，

en: And he spoke and disputed against the Hellenists. But they were seeking to kill him.
zh: 並且與講希臘話的猶太人談論辯駁，那些人卻想下手殺他。

en: And when the brothers learned this, they brought him down to Caesarea and sent him off to Tarsus.
zh: 弟兄們知道了，就送他到該撒利亞，差他往大數去。

en: So the church throughout all Judea and Galilee and Samaria had peace and was being built up. And walking in the fear of the Lord and in the comfort of the Holy Spirit, it multiplied.
zh: 那時猶太、加利利、撒瑪利亞各處的教會，都得到平安，被建立起來，存著敬畏主的心過生活，並且因著聖靈的激勵，人數增多起來。

en: Now as Peter went here and there among them all, he came down also to the saints who lived at Lydda.
zh: 彼得周遊各地的時候，也到了住在呂大的聖徒那裡。

en: There he found a man named Aeneas, bedridden for eight years, who was paralyzed.
zh: 他遇見一個人，名叫以尼雅，害了癱瘓病，在床上躺臥了八年。

en: And Peter said to him, "Aeneas, Jesus Christ heals you; rise and make your bed." And immediately he rose.
zh: 彼得對他說：“以尼雅，耶穌基督醫好你了！起來，收好你的褥子！”他就立刻起來。

en: And all the residents of Lydda and Sharon saw him, and they turned to the Lord.
zh: 所有住在呂大和沙崙的人，看見了他就歸向主。

en: Now there was in Joppa a disciple named Tabitha, which, translated, means Dorcas. She was full of good works and acts of charity.
zh: 在約帕有一個女門徒，名叫戴比莎，希臘話叫多加；她為人樂善好施。

en: In those days she became ill and died, and when they had washed her, they laid her in an upper room.
zh: 那時，她因病死了；有人把她洗淨了，停放在樓上。

en: Since Lydda was near Joppa, the disciples, hearing that Peter was there, sent two men to him, urging him, "Please come to us without delay."
zh: 呂大靠近約帕，門徒聽說彼得在那邊，就派兩個人去求他，說：“請到我們那邊去，不要耽延！”

en: So Peter rose and went with them. And when he arrived, they took him to the upper room. All the widows stood beside him weeping and showing tunics and other garments that Dorcas made while she was with them.
zh: 彼得就動身，跟他們一同去。到了之後，他們領他上樓。所有寡婦站在彼得旁邊哭，把多加和她們在一起的時候所做的內衣外衣拿給他看。

en: But Peter put them all outside, and knelt down and prayed; and turning to the body he said, "Tabitha, arise." And she opened her eyes, and when she saw Peter she sat up.
zh: 彼得叫大家出去之後，就跪下來禱告，然後轉過身來對著屍體說：“戴比莎，起來！”她就睜開眼睛，一看見彼得，就坐了起來。

en: And he gave her his hand and raised her up. Then calling the saints and widows, he presented her alive.
zh: 彼得伸手扶她起來，叫聖徒們和寡婦都進來，把多加活活地交給他們。

en: And it became known throughout all Joppa, and many believed in the Lord.
zh: 這事傳遍了約帕，就有很多人信了主。

en: And he stayed in Joppa for many days with one Simon, a tanner.
zh: 此後，彼得在約帕一個製皮工人西門的家裡住了許多日子。
